overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a samurai character traversing a snowy mountain ridge during golden hour. The character runs along a winding dirt path surrounded by snow-covered rocks and distant mountain ranges, with the sun low on the horizon casting long shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain ridge with panoramic vista

agents.ego_description: character running steadily along the open mountain ridge trail toward the setting sun

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky mountain ridge forming the immediate landscape
layered mountain ranges visible in the hazy distance
winding dirt path cutting through the snow-covered ridge

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open snowy mountain ridge with expansive views of distant peaks. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting a warm golden light across the snow-covered terrain as the character runs along the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with large snow-covered boulders

events.description: terrain transitions from open ridge to section with large snow-covered boulder formations

agents.ego_description: character continues running past large snow-covered rock formations on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: massive snow-capped rock formations lining the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through a section dominated by large snow-covered boulders on the left. The path remains exposed to the golden sunlight while the character navigates around the rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed mountain trail with cliff walls

events.description: trail curves right into a more enclosed passage with rocky cliff walls
entering shadowed area as the cliff wall blocks direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: character turns right along the winding trail, moving into a more enclosed mountain passage with cliff walls on the right

entered.detail: steep vertical rock face rising on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path curves right into a more enclosed mountain passage with steep rocky cliff walls rising on the right. The lighting shifts as the character moves into partial shadow while continuing along the snow-dusted trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain ridge that transitions from an expansive, sun-drenched vista into a narrow, shadowed passage. It begins with the character running along a winding dirt path under a low sun, with warm golden light illuminating the vast, snow-covered peaks in the distance. As the character progresses, the open terrain shifts to a section dominated by large, snow-capped boulders that flank the left side of the trail. The scene then curves right, moving away from the open sunlight and into a more enclosed mountain corridor. Finally, the environment tightens as steep rocky cliff walls rise on the right, casting the snow-dusted path into partial shadow.
